product.name: Industrial Pendant Light Fixtures Black Hanging Adjustable Schoolhouse Light Milk White Shade for Kitchen Bar Bedroom Bathroom Dining Room
features: Design:This modern pendant light ceiling hanging is proud to introduce a black finish accented with milky glass shade. This schoolhouse pendant lighting is a perfect choice over your kitchen island or dining area with single or pairs

Adjustable Height :The height of rod and angle of canopy are adjustable,sloped ceiling compatible,allowing you to customize the fixture to your lighting need and desired look.Minimum adjusted height: 21.45 inches. Ues single or combine rods to customize the hanging height
Dimmable: Designed to be dimmable when used with a compatible dimmer switch and bulb (not included); allowing you to adjust the preferred light brightness.
Safety: ETL listed for dry locations,hardwired,E26 base,60 W max(Not Included).

Application:This Black pendant light is ideal as kitchen island ceiling lighting, over a kitchen table or as kitchen light fixtures, as a dining room light or foyer lighting,as a bar area or porch hanging light, and more.
